reasoning: The document shows excellent content preservation (97.8% recall) but fails significantly on structural and visual integrity. The corroboration between the critical programmatic signal (90% image placeholder ratio) and the low LLM structural score (0.54) confirms that the visual and navigational components are broken. Specifically, the inconsistent heading hierarchy and missing images make the document unsuitable for automated approval.

concerns.description: Image placeholder ratio 90%: 19/21 images are broken/missing (transparent 1x1 placeholders)

concerns.analysis: The document title 'GICC Goals and Strategic Direction 2021-2023' appears only once in the source (Page 1), but is used as the title for both Section 0 and Section 11 in the output. Additionally, for Goals 1.1 through 1.7 (Sections 3-9), the slide titles are duplicated: once as the section title and again as the content of the heading element (e.g., Section 3 has title 'Goal 1.1' and heading 'Goal 1.1. Promote...'). This results in the text 'Goal 1.1' appearing more times in the output than in t
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Goal 1.1. Promote free and open discovery of and access to geospatial data created and maintained by local governments.
concerns.output_quote: Section title: "Goal 1.1", Element heading: "Goal 1.1. Promote free and open discovery of and access to geospatial data created and maintained by local governments."

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is inconsistent across the document. Slide titles for Goal 1.1 through 1.7 are assigned level 3 headings. However, slide titles for Goal 2.2 through 2.4 and 'Let’s Connect!' (all located inside Section 11) are assigned level 2 headings. These items are peers in the document structure and should be at the same level. Furthermore, in Section 10 (Goal 2.1), the slide title is not represented as a heading element at all, unlike previous sections.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Slide titles on pages 4-10 (Goal 1.x) vs slides on pages 12-15 (Goal 2.x, Connect).
concerns.output_quote: Section 3 element 0 is level 3 heading; Section 11 element 0 is level 2 heading.

action_items: Restore missing images or remove redundant 1x1 placeholders.
Standardize the heading hierarchy so that all Goal titles (1.1, 2.1, etc.) use the same heading level.
Remove duplicated section titles that repeat immediately as headers.
